summary: Iteration 32 - PersonalizedPillarSection Testing on 4 additional pillar pages: Paperwork, Advisory, Services, and Shop. ALL 4 PAGES PASSING - sections render correctly for logged-in user with pet.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended (same as previous iteration)

critical_code_review_comments: PersonalizedPillarSection correctly configured in PILLAR_CONFIGS for all 4 new pillars: paperwork, advisory, services, shop
PaperworkPage and AdvisoryPage use 'userPets[0]' - auto-populates with first pet on load
ServicesPage and ShopPage use 'selectedPet' state - auto-populates from localStorage or first pet
All item cards correctly show 'Concierge® creates' label
Modal opens correctly with pet info, description, special requests textarea, and 'Send to Concierge®' button
Horizontal scroll buttons work on desktop viewport (appear on hover)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with pet
context_for_next_testing_agent: PersonalizedPillarSection now works on ALL pillar pages. Previously tested (iteration_31): Care, Stay, Travel, Learn, Enjoy, Fit. This iteration tested: Paperwork, Advisory, Services, Shop. All 10 pillar pages now have PersonalizedPillarSection with correct pillar-specific items. Modal opens on item click with pet info, description, special requests textarea, and 'Send to Concierge®' button.
